use anyhow::{anyhow, Result};
use std::io;

fn handle_request(raw: &[u8]) -> Result<Response> {
    let req = parse_request(raw).map_err(|e| anyhow!("request failed: {e}"))?;
    match process(req) {
        Ok(resp) => Ok(resp),
        Err(e) => {
            if e.downcast_ref::<TimeoutError>().is_some() {
                Err(anyhow!("service timeout"))
            } else if e.downcast_ref::<io::Error>().is_some() {
                Err(anyhow!("io failure"))
            } else {
                Err(anyhow!("unknown error"))
            }
        }
    }
}

fn parse_request(_raw: &[u8]) -> Result<Request> {
    todo!()
}

fn process(_req: Request) -> Result<Response> {
    todo!()
}

struct Request;
struct Response;
struct TimeoutError;
